reviews.comment:
El ACA  en calle Independencia de MDP.brinda varios servicios a socios y público en gral.en la parte de atrás(sobre calle Jujuy)esta la verificadora fija de autos con Excelente y Ràpida atenciòn...

(Translated by Google)
The ACA on Independencia Street in Mar del Plata offers various services to members and the general public. In the back (on Jujuy Street) is the permanent vehicle inspection station with excellent and fast service...
